meta.title: Lerna Soft · Software agency
meta.description: Lerna Soft builds platforms, digital products and technical operations end-to-end for companies that need to build and operate.

hero.title:
We build software
that operates,
not just software that ships.
hero.subtitle: Lerna Soft partners with companies that need to design, build and operate critical digital products. Small senior teams, end-to-end ownership.

services.title: End-to-end capabilities
services.subtitle: We design, build and operate digital platforms. We work as a single team: discovery, architecture, code, deployment and ongoing operations.

web.title: Web platforms
web.desc: SaaS apps, internal dashboards and high-traffic sites built with modern stacks.

mobile.title: Mobile apps
mobile.desc: Native and hybrid apps connected to our own or third-party back-ends, performance-first.

cloud.title: Cloud & DevOps
cloud.desc: Infrastructure, continuous deployment, observability and ops on AWS, GCP or serverless.

data.title: Data & Analytics
data.desc: Pipelines, modeling, business dashboards and feedback loops embedded in product.

design.title: Product design
design.desc: Discovery, design systems, prototypes and user validation before we build.

staff.title: Staff augmentation
staff.desc: Senior engineers that join your team: design, frontend, backend, mobile, data or DevOps.

industries.title: Verticals where we have real reps
industries.subtitle: Each Group product taught us something. This is the experience we put to work for your vertical.

fintech.title: Fintech & lending
fintech.desc: Personal finance platforms, microlending and banking onboarding. Learned at BudgetApp and MicroImpulso.

media.title: Media & streaming
media.desc: Catalogs, embedded players and progressive sync without a traditional backend. Learned at Devil TV.

saas.title: SaaS & no-code
saas.desc: Multi-tenant visual builders, templating systems and automated publishing. Learned at Lerna Studio.

marketplace.title: Marketplaces & ERP
marketplace.desc: Stores with their own back-office, inventory management and ongoing ops. Learned at workshop-suite.

endToEnd.title: End-to-end teams
endToEnd.desc: Design, code, infrastructure and ops under one team.

senior.title: Senior by design
senior.desc: Small teams of experienced people, no outsourced juniors.

openSource.title: Open source DNA
openSource.desc: We work in open repos; traceability and PR culture as default.

multi.title: Multi-vertical reps
multi.desc: Fintech, media, SaaS and marketplaces — real cases, not slides.

nearshore.title: Bilingual nearshore
nearshore.desc: Americas time zones, Spanish and English with global clients.

operate.title: Built to operate
operate.desc: We design for day 100 after launch, not just day 1.

process.title: One process, five steps
process.subtitle: Light at the start to reduce risk, dense in delivery to ensure quality, persistent after launch so it operates.

s1.title: Discovery
s1.desc: We understand the business, the users and the constraints. We exit with a shared brief.

s2.title: Architecture
s2.desc: We define stack, modules, integrations and deployment plan. No surprises on sprint 3.

s3.title: Build
s3.desc: Short sprints, weekly demos, trunk-based branches. What you see is already deployed.

s4.title: Launch
s4.desc: Controlled rollout, observability active from day one, runbooks ready for the client team.

s5.title: Operate
s5.desc: Support, evolution and continuous improvements with clear SLAs. This is where most fail.

works.title: Real products from the Group
works.subtitle: These are products we designed, built and operate. The experience we offer comes straight from here.

budget.title: BudgetApp
budget.desc: Personal finance platform: Next.js frontend, serverless backend on AWS Lambda and React mobile app.

studio.title: Lerna Studio
studio.desc: Wix-style multi-tenant visual builder. React SPA + persistence via Git + Pages, no traditional backend.

devil.title: Devil TV
devil.desc: Streaming catalog with no backend: progressive sync via GitHub Issues + Actions, legal VidAPI embed.

org.title: How Lerna Soft is organized
org.subtitle: Three business units under a single governance. Software house, agency and a jewelry vertical (currently paused).

team.title: The people behind the Group
team.subtitle: Distributed team with a nearshore operational base. Replace these profiles with real names when you're ready.

testimonials.title: Voices from those who worked with us

t1.quote: "We went from a fragile MVP to a platform that operates 24/7 without us having to think about it. The team gets into the problem, not just the code."
t1.author: Name Surname

t2.quote: "They onboarded in a week, understood the domain in two sprints and within two months we were shipping new features with confidence. Highly recommended."
t2.author: Name Surname

contact.title:
Ready for your
next project?
contact.subtitle: Tell us what you need. We respond in under 24 hours with an initial proposal and next steps.

form.service: What service are you looking for?
form.note: Thanks. We'll be in touch soon.

footer.tagline: Digital products for companies that need to build and operate. Part of Lerna Soft.

homeCta.title: Let's build together.
homeCta.lead: Explore our capabilities, our case studies, and meet the team. When you're ready, let's talk.

points.p1Desc: Design, code, infra and ops under one roof.
points.p2Desc: No outsourced junior layers, no constant rotation.
points.p3Desc: We design for day 100, not just launch day.

about.title:
We build software
that operates, not just delivers.
about.lead: Lerna Soft is a team focused on digital platforms that reach production, scale, and stay alive. Design, engineering, infrastructure and operations under one roof.

values.title: Six principles that shape every product
values.subtitle: How you work defines the outcome. We apply these principles from sprint zero through day 1000 — they're what sets us apart.

end2end.title: End-to-end teams
end2end.desc: Design, code, infrastructure and operations under one team. No handoffs across areas, no 'not my problem'.

senior.title: Senior by design
senior.desc: Small teams of seasoned people. No outsourced junior layers, no quarterly rotation.

operate.title: Built to operate
operate.desc: We design for day 100, not just launch day. Observability, runbooks and SLAs from sprint zero.

public.title: We learn in public
public.desc: Open repos where we can. Versioned ADRs, shared postmortems. Traceability as culture.

oncall.title: On-call with our clients
oncall.desc: On-call rotation alongside the client team. We learn incidents first-hand, not through monthly reports.

docs.title: Docs that outlive people
docs.desc: Runbooks, dashboards, ADRs and recorded decisions. What's written outlasts team rotation.

servicesHead.title: What we do
servicesHead.subtitle: Six practices covering the full life cycle of a digital product — from sprint zero to ongoing operation.

blog.title: Notes from the trenches
blog.subtitle: How we build, what we learned and what we'd break today. Team notes, technical decisions and operations stories.
blog.empty: No articles published yet. Check back soon.
